title: Tree-Based Models Path
description: Build fluency in Tree-Based Models inside Computer Vision by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Deeplabv3+
steps.summary: Deeplabv3+ belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Tree-Based Models. Start after DeepLabv3 and R(2+1)D. It opens into DeepLabv3+-Xception-71 and semantic segmentation with Deeplabv3+.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Xception
steps.summary: Xception belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Tree-Based Models. Compare it with HED-Xception and DeepLabv3+-Xception-71. It opens into HED-Xception and DeepLabv3+-Xception-71.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Filter Method
steps.summary: Filter Method belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Tree-Based Models. Compare it with Xception and pgvector. It opens into kalman filter and Wiener Filter.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: DeepLabv3+-Xception-71
steps.summary: DeepLabv3+-Xception-71 belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Tree-Based Models. Start after Deeplabv3+ and Xception.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Stability Selection with Bootstrapping
steps.summary: Stability Selection with Bootstrapping belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Tree-Based Models. Start after Bootstrapping and Selection.

steps.title: SQLite + pgvector extension (lite)
steps.summary: SQLite + pgvector extension (lite) belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Tree-Based Models. Start after pgvector and R(2+1)D.

steps.title: pgvector
steps.summary: pgvector belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Computer Vision / Tree-Based Models. Compare it with SQLite + pgvector extension (lite) and Xception. It opens into SQLite + pgvector extension (lite) and AWS RDS pgvector.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
